_comment: THE SHARED BOX for squad-room. One governed Toolbox consumed by a whole agent TEAM (lead, researcher, builder). Hero tools have rich descriptions + additional_search_text and live in hero_tools/. releases.cut carries require_approval=always (governance). Every team member sees the same 2 meta-tools; the box stays one flat-cost surface for the whole team.

tools.name: issues.assign
tools.description: Break a feature request into work items and assign them to team members; use when the lead wants to plan, divide up, or hand out tasks for a piece of work.
tools.additional_search_text: plan break down assign delegate tasks work items tickets divide up hand out backlog feature request

tools.name: kb.search_docs
tools.description: Search the team's internal docs and codebase notes for how something is already done; use for find existing patterns, how do we currently, where is this implemented questions.
tools.additional_search_text: search docs codebase how do we currently existing pattern where is implemented architecture notes find prior art

tools.name: design.lookup_tokens
tools.description: Look up the design system tokens, color palette, spacing, and theming variables from the style guide.
tools.additional_search_text: design tokens style guide colors palette theming variables dark mode spacing typography brand

tools.name: repo.open_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request with a set of code changes on a branch; use when the builder wants to submit, push up, or open a PR for work.
tools.additional_search_text: pull request PR open submit push up code changes branch merge request commit

tools.name: ci.run_tests
tools.description: Run the CI test suite against a branch and return pass/fail with coverage; use for run the tests, check CI, is the build green requests.
tools.additional_search_text: run tests CI build pipeline unit tests green check passing coverage verify branch

tools.name: releases.cut
tools.description: Cut a tagged release or preview build from a branch; this is a governed action that requires lead approval before it fires.
tools.additional_search_text: release cut tag ship deploy preview build version publish promote

tools.name: issues.comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue or work item.

tools.name: issues.close
tools.description: Close a completed issue.

tools.name: repo.read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the repository.

tools.name: repo.create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch.

tools.name: repo.review_pr
tools.description: Leave a review on a pull request.

tools.name: ci.read_status
tools.description: Read the latest CI run status.

tools.name: ci.rerun
tools.description: Re-run a failed CI job.

tools.name: deploy.to_staging
tools.description: Deploy a build to the staging environment.

tools.name: deploy.rollback
tools.description: Roll back a deployment.

tools.name: metrics.read_dashboard
tools.description: Read product metrics from the dashboard.

tools.name: metrics.create_alert
tools.description: Create a monitoring alert.

tools.name: web.search
tools.description: Search the public web for external references.

tools.name: kb.search_decisions
tools.description: Search the team's architecture decision records.

tools.name: people.who_owns
tools.description: Find which team member owns a component.

tools.name: calendar.book_review
tools.description: Book a design or code review meeting.

tools.name: secrets.rotate
tools.description: Rotate a service credential.

tools.name: docs.publish
tools.description: Publish an updated docs page.

tools.name: feedback.search
tools.description: Search user feedback by topic.
